TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit TranscribedPhrase extends System.Object implements class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IJsonModel`1<class Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscribedPhrase>, class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IPersistableModel`1<class Azure.AI.Speech.Transcription.TranscribedPhrase>
Public Class TranscribedPhrase Implements IJsonModel(Of TranscribedPhrase), IPersistableModel(Of TranscribedPhrase)
type TranscribedPhrase = class interface IJsonModel<TranscribedPhrase> interface IPersistableModel<TranscribedPhrase>

Docs.summary: Represents a transcribed phrase with timing, speaker, and word-level details.
Docs.remarks: Collections exposed by this class (such as Words) use IList for compatibility but should be treated as read-only. Modifying collection contents may lead to unexpected behavior and is not supported.

Docs.summary: The confidence value for the phrase.

MemberSignature.Value: public int? Speaker { get; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<int32> Speaker
Public ReadOnly Property Speaker As Nullable(Of Integer)
member this.Speaker : Nullable<int>

Docs.summary: A unique integer number that is assigned to each speaker detected in the audio without particular order. Only present if speaker diarization is enabled.
